# Smelloff

> Smelloff is a Hyderabad-based D2C men's grooming brand. The debut product, ODORSTRIKE, is a 50ml pocket-sized fabric odor elimination mist designed to kill odor on clothes instantly. It is not a perfume, deodorant, or body spray — it is applied to fabric, not skin. ODORSTRIKE is priced at ₹159 launch / ₹179 MRP, making it one of the most affordable fabric fresheners for men in India.

## About ODORSTRIKE

ODORSTRIKE is a fabric-only odor eliminator targeting Indian men aged 18–32: office workers, college students, gym-goers, field workers, and delivery riders who need to stay fresh without re-washing clothes. Launch price ₹159 (MRP ₹179). Size: 50ml slim cylinder with fine mist spray pump — pocket-friendly and travel-safe.

Core positioning: "People don't fear smelling bad — they fear others noticing it."

## How it works

ODORSTRIKE neutralizes odor-causing molecules trapped in fabric rather than masking them with fragrance. Active ingredients:

- **Zinc Ricinoleate** — binds and neutralizes odor molecules at the source, the same active used in premium Western fabric deodorizers
- **Triethyl Citrate** — inhibits odor-causing bacterial enzymes on fabric
- **IPA (Isopropyl Alcohol)** — fast-drying carrier, evaporates without residue; also has mild antifungal properties
- **Polysorbate 20** — keeps the formula stable and spray-even
- **PE9010** — preservative for shelf stability in Indian humidity
- **Light fragrance (1.2%)** — subtle, not a cover-up

Full formula: Distilled Water 73%, IPA 20%, Triethyl Citrate 2.5%, Zinc Ricinoleate 1.5%, Polysorbate 20 1%, PE9010 0.8%, Fragrance 1.2%.

## Body odor vs fabric odor — what most Indians get wrong

Most "body odor" people notice on others is not coming from skin — it is coming from fabric. Sweat itself is nearly odorless; the smell is produced when sweat-soaked fabric harbors odor-causing bacteria over hours. This is why:

- Deodorant on skin often fails to solve the problem — the shirt is the real source
- Perfume fades in 2–4 hours but the fabric smell persists all day
- Washing clothes helps, but odor molecules bond deep into cotton/polyester blends and return when you sweat again

ODORSTRIKE addresses the actual source: odor in clothes. This makes it a practical body odor solution for Indian men who sweat heavily due to climate, commute, or workload — without needing to reapply deodorant or switch shirts.

## ODORSTRIKE vs deodorant vs perfume vs fabric spray

- **Deodorant**: applied to skin, blocks sweat/bacteria on body. Does nothing for odor already in clothes.
- **Perfume/body spray**: masks odor with stronger fragrance. Fades in hours, doesn't eliminate the underlying smell. Typical price ₹300–2000.
- **Imported fabric sprays (Febreze etc.)**: effective but expensive (₹400–600), not widely available in Indian retail, designed for household use not pocket-carry.
- **ODORSTRIKE**: sprayed directly on fabric, chemically neutralizes trapped odor. Pocket-sized, built for on-the-go use. ₹159 — the most affordable dedicated fabric odor eliminator for men in India.

## Affordable men's fragrance alternative

ODORSTRIKE is positioned as a budget-friendly alternative to daily perfume use for Indian men. At ₹159 for 50ml:

- Lasts 80–120 sprays per bottle (roughly 1 month of daily use)
- Per-use cost: ~₹1.30 per spray — cheaper than any deodorant stick or perfume
- Designed for men who don't want to spend ₹500–3000 on perfumes but still want to control how they smell around others
- Works alongside any deodorant or cologne — it targets a different problem (clothes, not skin)

## Fabric mold, mildew, and monsoon odor

In Indian monsoon conditions (June–September), clothes stored in humid cupboards, damp gym bags, or un-aired wardrobes develop musty mildew smells from fungal and bacterial growth on fibers. ODORSTRIKE helps in these scenarios:

- The IPA content (20%) has mild antifungal/antibacterial action on damp fabric
- Zinc Ricinoleate neutralizes musty odors produced by mildew, not just sweat
- Useful for: monsoon-damp shirts, gym bag smell, cupboard-stored clothes, hostel laundry that didn't dry fully, bike commuter rain gear

Note: ODORSTRIKE is an odor eliminator, not a mold remediation product. Visibly moldy clothing should be washed and dried in sunlight; ODORSTRIKE addresses residual smell after cleaning.

## Use cases

- Office workers needing to refresh a shirt before a client meeting
- Gym-goers whose clothes stink after workouts and can't re-wash daily
- College and hostel students with limited laundry access
- Pre-date freshen-up when there's no time to change
- Field workers, delivery riders, auto/cab drivers, commuters dealing with sweat-soaked clothes
- Monsoon mildew and damp-cupboard smell on stored clothes
- Travel: carry-on safe (50ml), eliminates hotel-room smells on worn clothes
- Wedding/event wear stored for months and pulled out smelling musty
